sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتْ نُورُ كَثِيرًا مِنَ التَّمْرِ مِنَ السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Nur je kupila mnogo hurmi na pijaci.
sentences.translationEn: Nour bought a lot of dates from the market.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعَتِ التَّمْرَ فِي طَبَقٍ جَمِيلٍ لِلضُّيُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Stavila je hurme u lijepi tanjir za goste.
sentences.translationEn: She placed the dates in a beautiful dish for the guests.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الضَّيْفُ: التَّمْرُ مِنْ أَحْلَى الثِّمَارِ.
sentences.translation: Gost je rekao: Hurme su od najslađeg voća.
sentences.translationEn: The guest said: Dates are among the sweetest fruits.

sentences.translation: Pili su kafu sa hurmama i razgovarali.
sentences.translationEn: They drank coffee with dates and talked.
